title: Unions, Unknown Values, and Control-Flow Narrowing · Contract Lens: Assertion Functions
summary: Convert an unknown status feed into trusted records using evidence-producing guards and exhaustive decisions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts assertion functions increment in an unknown-to-domain validation pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use assertion functions only when failure behavior and the asserted runtime evidence are explicit.
Write boolean predicates and type predicates whose runtime checks actually justify their claimed types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
